3317710.name: Razorback
3317710.description:
Faithful to the genre-defining Trackmania series, Razorback is a groundbreaking futuristic racing game that takes players on a high-speed journey. Piloting advanced ships with innovative vertical engine systems, players will experience thrilling races filled with dynamic challenges and strategic maneuvers. The game emphasizes not only speed but also creativity, allowing for unique racing styles. Competing against other players in time-attack, Razorback is designed for those who crave adrenaline-fueled action and a fresh take on the racing genre.

This game is under active devlopment, some feature might be uncomplete. See Discord server for more info.
